3105950.name: Desert Racer
3105950.description:
Are you a good driver? A game to test your reaction speed. The player controls a car, the speed of which is gradually increasing. It is necessary to turn and collect gasoline cans in time.
A fun game with dynamic cheerful music. There is an abandoned desert around. Collect the remaining gasoline and move forward, and do not crash into the fence!
The simple, intuitive gameplay allows you to immediately immerse yourself in the game. And the cheerful atmosphere will leave a pleasant impression.
